market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Japandi Loft Studio – 27% Cheaper Than Avg!
Modern Loft with Projector & Bathtub – Sleeps 4
Cozy Japandi Studio – Low Price, High Style
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to our Modern Japandi Loft Studio, a sleek and tranquil retreat that blends Scandinavian minimalism with Japanese warmth. Designed for up to four guests, this entire‑home loft features a spacious open‑plan living area, a comfortable queen‑size bed, and a second sofa bed for extra guests. Unwind on the stylish Japandi furnishings while enjoying a high‑definition projector for movie nights, and soak away in the luxurious bathtub after a day of exploring the city.

The kitchen is fully equipped with modern appliances, allowing you to prepare simple meals or a coffee to start your morning. Large windows flood the space with natural light, highlighting the clean lines and neutral palette that make the loft feel both airy and inviting. With a nightly rate of £113.12, you’re paying 27% less than the city’s median rate of £154.60, giving you premium style at a bargain price.

Our guests consistently love the experience, reflected in a 4.95 rating from 83 reviews. Although the listing is not yet a Superhost, the high rating demonstrates strong satisfaction. Currently, the next 90 days show a 25% occupancy rate, leaving 68 open nights ready for you to book. Whether you’re traveling for work, a city break, or a small family getaway, this Japandi loft offers a perfect blend of comfort, design, and value.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space (balcony or garden) – a high‑value amenity guests seek
Dedicated parking spot – improves convenience and attracts drivers
Entertainment amenities (streaming device, board games) – complements the projector
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution shot of the main living area showing the projector screen and Japandi décor as the cover photo; it instantly showcases the unique entertainment feature and design appeal.
key_diagnosis: Occupancy is only 25% for the next 90 days (68 open nights) despite a 27% lower nightly rate than the market median – run a targeted promotion to fill those nights.
Add at least three high‑value amenities (outdoor space, parking, entertainment) to match market expectations and boost perceived value.
Upload a minimum of 8 professional photos covering living area, bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, and any view; set the living‑area shot with projector as the cover to attract clicks.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your loft is priced 27% below the market median yet only 25% booked for the next 90 days – there’s massive upside to fill those 68 open nights.
